reviews.comment:
Soy socia del ACA de toda la vida.
Siempre cargo en la estación cuando salimos a navegar,los chicos están al servicio del cliente y muy atentos.
Aceptan todos los medios de pago y son rápidos en la atención.
Recomiendo!!

(Translated by Google)
I've been a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) my whole life. I always fill up at the station when we go sailing; the staff are very helpful and attentive. They accept all forms of payment and are quick to serve you. I highly recommend them!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWamFYWlFkM0JvU25kSU5FZEJOVmxsVUVFd1ZIYxAB

reviews.comment:
Bárbaro ! Conseguí 2t , aceite para el barco y garrafa ! Al mismo precio que en ciudad ! No compro más a la almacenera !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Awesome! I got 2-stroke fuel, boat oil, and a jerrycan! At the same price as in town! I'm never buying from the corner store again!

reviews.comment:
Cargue gasoil acá hace 15 dias me arruinaron el barco nadie me atiende ni de a hacen cargo me llevo gastado un  paquete de guita en mecánico vaciar tanques sacar el agua q me metieron filtros limpieza inyectores limpiar decantador un desastre los voy a denunciar a ypf

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with diesel here 15 days ago and they ruined my boat. Nobody is helping me or taking responsibility. I've spent a fortune on mechanics, emptying the tanks, removing the water they put in, cleaning filters, injectors, and cleaning the decanter. It's a disaster. I'm going to report them to YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s0eVVGY3hiVTl3ZDFseWF6QlphV0ZTUlV3MlMwRRAB
